mapper.select: SELECT total_use_cnt, total_carbon_saved, total_station_cnt, avg_use_time, top_district, created_at FROM bike_kpi ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT month, SUM(total_use_cnt) AS total_use_cnt, SUM(total_station_cnt) AS total_station_cnt FROM bike_monthly_summary GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT weekday, SUM(total_use_cnt) AS total_use_cnt FROM bike_weekday_summary GROUP BY weekday ORDER BY CASE weekday WHEN '월' THEN 1 WHEN '화' THEN 2 WHEN '수' THEN 3 WHEN '목' THEN 4 WHEN '금' THEN 5 WHEN '토' THEN 6 WHEN '일' THEN 7 ELSE 99 END

SELECT age_group, SUM(total_use_cnt) AS total_use_cnt FROM bike_age_group_summary GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY CASE age_group WHEN '~10대' THEN 1 WHEN '20대' THEN 2 WHEN '30대' THEN 3 WHEN '40대' THEN 4 WHEN '50대' THEN 5 WHEN '60대' THEN 6 WHEN '70대~' THEN 7 ELSE 99 END
SELECT district, total_use_cnt FROM ( SELECT district, SUM(total_use_cnt) AS total_use_cnt FROM bike_district_summary GROUP BY district ) ORDER BY total_use_cnt DESC
SELECT rent_type, total_use_cnt FROM ( SELECT rent_type, SUM(total_use_cnt) AS total_use_cnt FROM bike_rent_type_summary GROUP BY rent_type ) ORDER BY total_use_cnt DESC
